description_long: This object is a half lemon with a yellow, dimpled outer rind and a pale, fibrous interior. The lemon is cut lengthwise, exposing the two main segments and the white pith that runs along the center. The rind appears thick and slightly uneven, with a natural, bumpy texture typical of citrus fruits. The interior flesh is pale and somewhat translucent, with no visible seeds and a moist, glossy appearance. The cut edge is irregular, showing the fibrous structure of the fruit. The overall form is slightly asymmetrical, with one end more rounded and the other tapering to a subtle point.
description: A half lemon with a yellow, textured rind and a pale, fibrous interior exposed by a lengthwise cut.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the lemon, with the yellow rind and the pale interior segments clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the thicker rind at the back and the central pith, with the cut edge and interior structure prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the lengthwise cut, the two main interior segments, and the smooth, curved rind.
description_view_3: Angled view from the other end, focusing on the rounded tip and the exposed, moist interior flesh.
attribute_peel_condition: The lemon's peel is dimpled, thick, and intact, with a slightly uneven surface and no visible cracks or peeling.
